title: Workflows: Ability to tell if the triggering user is in a Team
excerpt: My particular case is for Activities, we want some fields to be populated differently depending on what Team the triggering user is in.  Would be helpful as well if we wanted different subsequent workflow branches depend…

posts.author: TraceyVF (Tracey VanFleet)
posts.cookedHtml: My particular case is for Activities, we want some fields to be populated differently depending on what Team the triggering user is in. Would be helpful as well if we wanted different subsequent workflow branches depending on the same.
